attribute_selection_debug.request_text: Gib mir die Spannungen aller Busse in PF.

predefined_llm_result.rationale: The user requested 'Spannungen aller Busse' (voltages of all buses). In PowerFactory, the standard bus voltage is the line-to-ground (Leiter-Erde) voltage, corresponding to the predefined field 'voltage_ln'. The aliases for 'voltage_ln' include 'Leiter-Erde-Spannung' and 'spannung gegen erde', which align with the German term 'Spannung' in the context of bus voltages. 'voltage_ll' (line-to-line) is not the standard for bus voltage and was not specified by the user.

llm_decision.rationale: <max_depth>

full_option_llm_result.rationale: The user requested bus voltages ('Spannungen'). The attribute 'attr::m:u' (unit p.u.) represents the per-unit line-to-ground voltage (phase voltage), which is the standard bus voltage measurement in PowerFactory. The semantic field 'voltage_ln' maps to this attribute, but the raw attribute handle is the direct data point matching the user's request.

llm_decision.rationale: <max_depth>

attribute_selection_debug.final_rationale: The user requested 'Spannungen aller Busse' (voltages of all buses). In PowerFactory, the standard bus voltage is the line-to-ground (Leiter-Erde) voltage, corresponding to the predefined field 'voltage_ln'. The aliases for 'voltage_ln' include 'Leiter-Erde-Spannung' and 'spannung gegen erde', which align with the German term 'Spannung' in the context of bus voltages. 'voltage_ll' (line-to-line) is not the standard for bus voltage and was not specified by the user.

In PowerFactory, the standard bus voltage is the line-to-ground (Leiter-Erde) voltage, corresponding to the predefined field 'voltage_ln'. The aliases for 'voltage_ln' include 'Leiter-Erde-Spannung' and 'spannung gegen erde', which align with the German term 'Spannung' in the context of bus voltages. 'voltage_ll' (line-to-line) is not the standard for bus voltage and was not specified by the user.
